arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Atalanta vs Real Madrid Preview, Champions League 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Jose Perez discuss: What’s changed since the Super Cup matchup between Atalanta and Real Madrid ?

arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti has come under fire in recent months for underutilising some of his young talents. The lack of minutes given to youth prospects Endrick and Arda…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti yet to make Vinicius Junior call ahead of ‘demanding’ Atalanta
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti has confirmed that Jude Bellingham is 100% fit to play against Atalanta in their Champions League crunch match against Atalanta on Tuesday night, but was less certain of whether Brazilian duo Vinicius Junior or Rodrygo Goes would go from the start. Los Blancos find themselves 24th in the Champions League […] The post Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti yet to make Vinicius Junior call ahead of ‘demanding’ Atalanta appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Why Real Madrid had scouts present at Girona clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid had scouts in attendance at the club’s weekend meeting with Girona. This came with a view to keeping a watchful eye on the performance of…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star comes out on top in FIFPRO World 11 voting
arts.sum: He enjoyed an incredible first season with Real Madrid, lifting LaLiga and the Champions League, before helping England to the final of the Euros. However FIFPRO have since revealed that the player with the largest share of the vote was Real Madrid and England star Jude Bellingham .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid players dominate men’s FIFPRO World 11
arts.sum: Olga Carmona of Real Madrid and Barcelona duo Alexia Putellas and Aitana Bonmatí . Manchester City goalkeeper Ederson edges out Aston Villa and Argentina’s Dibu Martínez, with only Virgil van Dijk (Liverpool) breaking the City-Madrid stronghold.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid cruise to victory in Girona
arts.sum: The Whites took the lead after 36 minutes with another goal from an inspired Bellingham, who has now scored in the last five league games. With the score at 0-1 at half-time, Real Madrid had the chance to extend their lead just after the break.
